criteria.criterion: A `logging.getLogger("rebar.review_bot.voter").info(...)` record is written to stdout once the review-bot app module has configured logging; before the fix the same record produces no stdout output.
The handler is idempotent: importing/configuring twice does not attach a second handler (no duplicate log lines).
`REVIEW_BOT_LOG_LEVEL=DEBUG` lowers the effective level (env override honored); an absent/invalid value falls back to INFO.
Existing gates stay green: `make lint && make typecheck && python -m pytest tests/unit/test_review_bot.py -q` all exit 0.
